title: Dhammapada, Chapter 2: On Heedfulness
description: Chapter 2 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 2 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Heedfulness is the path to the deathless. Heedlessness is the path to death. The heedful do not die. The heedless are already dead.
